events.label: assistant
events.text: Findings written to `/app/answer.json`: the condition is a missing load/output reactor (or dV/dt filter) on long VFD-to-motor leads, which allows reflected-wave voltage transients (up to ~2x bus voltage) at the motor terminals — a non-compliant, installed-defective condition per OEM drive manuals (invoked through NEC 110.3(B)/430). Marked `fail`, `risk: high`, with corrective actions (install correct reactor/filter, verify lead length vs. carrier frequency, insulation/surge test before close-out).
